body.title: Push sources: dynamic salience/urgency based on milieu state
body.result: Added milieu_scale(salience, urgency) helper to BasePushSource. Under high arousal (>0.3) background salience is suppressed (scale 0.3-1.0); under low arousal (<-0.2) boosted slightly (+15% max). Urgency not scaled — only relevance. Wired into MemorySurfacer (LTM surfacing) and HeartbeatSource (time tick). Other sources can opt-in via self.milieu_scale() call. All 1684 tests pass.
body.description: Every push source has hardcoded salience/urgency values (e.g. user_input 0.7/0.7, heartbeat 0.5/0.3). Under high arousal the system cannot narrow attention — all sources retain static priority. Fix: push() methods query milieu.get_state() and scale salience inversely to arousal (high stress → suppress low-urgency background noise). Implement as a BasePushSource.milieu_scale() helper. Systems dynamics finding from deep-audit Panel 10.
